+using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
+
+namespace UniversityCourseCatalog.Models;
+
+public class EnrollmentRequest
+{
+    [Required(ErrorMessage = "Full name is required.")]
+    [StringLength(100)]
+    public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
+
+    [Required(ErrorMessage = "Student ID is required.")]
+    [RegularExpression(@"^[A-Za-z0-9\-]+$", ErrorMessage = "Student ID must contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens.")]
+    [StringLength(20)]
+    public string StudentId { get; set; } = string.Empty;
+
+    [Required(ErrorMessage = "Please select a course.")]
+    [Range(1, int.MaxValue, ErrorMessage = "Please select a course.")]
+    public int CourseId { get; set; }
+}
+

+    {
+        var query = Courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (departmentId.HasValue && departmentId.Value > 0)
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId.Value);
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
+        {
+            var term = searchTerm.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>
+                c.Title.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.CourseCode.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.InstructorName.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+        }
+
+        return query.ToList();

+    public IReadOnlyList<Department> GetDepartments() => Departments;
+
+    public Department? GetDepartment(int id) => Departments.Find(d => d.Id == id);
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetAllCourses() => Courses;
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetFeaturedCourses() => Courses.Where(c => c.IsFeatured).ToList();
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> SearchCourses(string? searchTerm, int? departmentId)
+    {
+        var query = Courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (departmentId.HasValue && departmentId.Value > 0)
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId.Value);
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
+        {
+            var term = searchTerm.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>
+                c.Title.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.CourseCode.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.InstructorName.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+        }
+
+        return query.ToList();
+    }
+
+    public Course? GetCourse(int id) => Courses.Find(c => c.Id == id);
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetCoursesByDepartment(int departmentId) =>
+        Courses.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId).ToList();

data.content:
Build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors. Here's what was created:

**University Course Catalog — Blazor Web App**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Models/Department.cs` | Department model |
| `Models/Course.cs` | Course model (code, title, schedule, credits, instructor) |
| `Models/EnrollmentRequest.cs` | Form model with validation attributes |
| `Services/CatalogService.cs` | In-memory data store with search/filter (6 departments, 15 courses) |
| `Pages/Home.razor` | Homepage — featured courses cards + department links |
| `Pages/Courses.razor` | Searchable/filterable course list (interactive SSR) |
| `Pages/CourseDetail.razor` | Full course detail with instructor bio, schedule, credits |
| `Pages/Departments.razor` | Department listing |
| `Pages/DepartmentDetail.razor` | Department detail with its courses |
| `Pages/Enroll.razor` | Enrollment request form with validation + confirmation |

**Key design choices:**
- **Interactive Server** render mode on pages needing interactivity (search filtering, form submission); static SSR elsewhere
- Search filters by title, course code, description, and instructor name
- Course detail links directly to enrollment form with course pre-selected via query string
- Standard `EditForm` with `DataAnnotationsValidator` — no wizards or real-time validation
- `CatalogService` registered as singleton with seed data

Run with `dotnet run --project UniversityCourseCatalog`.
